title: Inheritance, MRO, Super, and Mixins · Traceback Repair Bay
summary: Evaluate extension designs for physical, digital, and restricted library resources. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in an extensible resource type hierarchy and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use inheritance when a subtype preserves the semantic contract and reusable implementation of its base type.
Override methods while preserving input, output, state, exception, and side-effect expectations of callers.
Use zero-argument super for cooperative method chains and pass compatible arguments through participating classes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-oop cumulative stakeholder program."""

steps.title: Order the regression proof
steps.instruction: Order the Oop Composition Vs Inheritance evidence cycle before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Oop Composition Vs Inheritance assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Choose composition, protocols, delegation, or inheritance by variability, substitutability, ownership, and change cost. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: python inheritance mro. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Oop Composition Vs Inheritance, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a complete first version of an extensible resource type hierarchy while every earlier competency remains active.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Inheritance is more object-oriented than composition. This fails the Oop Composition Vs Inheritance contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.
